zh.lifeSummary: 當Gaucher I de JOIGNY於1161年出生在法國崔洛易特a奧雷納德時，他的父親Renard de Joigny IV41歲，母親Adèle de Nevers16歲。他和Amicie de Montfort至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1237年11月在法國布格喬尼享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gaucher I de JOIGNY于1161年出生在法国崔洛易特a奧雷納德时，他的父亲Renard de Joigny IV41岁，母亲Adèle de Nevers16岁。他和Amicie de Montfort至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1237年11月在法国布格喬尼享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gaucher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Armand, Francoise, Jacques, Laurette, Lucien, Philippe.
from the ancient Germanic personal name Walhari, composed of the elements walh ‘stranger’ and hari ‘army’.

variants.name: Coetzee
meanings: Afrikaans: probably an altered form of Dutch Goetzee, which is of French Huguenot origin, probably from Gaucher . Alternatively, Coetzee may be an altered form of Dutch Kuzee, a habitational name recorded in the 16th century as Cudsee and Cutsee, from a toponym located in Zeeland, which may be interpreted as Cut's-see ‘watercourse of Cudo’.
History: Dirk Coetzee, born in Kampen in the Netherlands around 1655, died in Cape Town in 1725.

en.lifeSummary: When Gaucher I de JOIGNY was born in 1161, in Châteaurenard, Loiret, Centre, France, his father, Renard de Joigny IV, was 41 and his mother, Adèle de Nevers, was 16. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Amicie de Montfort. He died about November 1237, in Joigny, Yonne, Burgundy, France, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gaucher I de JOIGNY est né en 1161, à Châteaurenard, Loiret, Centre, France, son père, Renard de Joigny IV, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Nevers, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Amicie de Montfort. Il est décédé environ novembre 1237, à Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gaucher I de JOIGNY 1161 in Châteaurenard, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Renard de Joigny IV 41 und seine Mutter Adèle de Nevers 16. Er hatte mit Amicie de Montfort mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um November 1237 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Joigny, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gaucher I de JOIGNY è nato il nel 1161 nel Châteaurenard, Loiret, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Renard de Joigny IV, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Adèle de Nevers, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Amicie de Montfort. Morì circa novembre 1237, nel Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gaucher I de JOIGNYが1161年にフランスセントアロイアーエトチaテアウレナルドで生まれた時，父Renard de Joigny IVは41歳，母Adèle de Neversは16歳であった。彼はAmicie de Montfortとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1237年11月にフランスボウルゴグンイオンジョイグニーで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gaucher I de JOIGNY(이)가 1161년 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 cha테오리나르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renard de Joigny IV(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Adèle de Nevers(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Amicie de Montfort(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1237년 11월 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 조익니에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gaucher I de JOIGNY nasceu em 1161, em Châteaurenard, Loiret, Centre, França, seu pai, Renard de Joigny IV, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Nevers, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Amicie de Montfort. Ele faleceu aproximadamente novembro de 1237, em Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gaucher I de JOIGNY родился в 1161 г. в местности чaторенард, лоирет, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Renard de Joigny IV было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Nevers, 16. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Amicie de Montfort. Он умер около ноябрь 1237 г. в местности джоигни, енн, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gaucher I de JOIGNY nació en 1161, en Châteaurenard, Loiret, Centre, Francia, su papá, Renard de Joigny IV, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Adèle de Nevers, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Amicie de Montfort. Murió aproximadamente noviembre de 1237, en Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 76 años.
